name: label
visual_summary: The Label component displays its children content and supports various styling and accessibility options. Developers use it when needing a label for elements such as form inputs or icons. It's used in a static context as a visual cue.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: label
Description: The Label component displays its children content and supports various styling and accessibility options. Developers use it when needing a label for elements such as form inputs or icons. It's used in a static context as a visual cue.
Style: neutral, simple, accessible
Interactions: 
Tags: form, accessibility, styling

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
